summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively: no shared canonical was selected, all ten listed open PRs remain open as independent maintainer-review/backlog items, and the one hydrated security-sensitive linked issue is routed to central security handling. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation is planned because this job disables merge/fix/raise_pr, low-signal closeout is disabled, and the PRs are focused or still need proof/review.

actions.reason: Focused contributor bug-fix PR with failed proof gate; keep open for its own proof/review lane rather than closing or merging.
Useful focused PR, but unresolved review/change judgment means it should stay open independently.
Large focused contributor PR needs maintainer technical review and proof reconciliation; keep as its own independent lane.
Focused provider compatibility PR should remain open for maintainer review and check interpretation, not be closed from inventory cleanup.
Focused contributor PR with maintainer rebase signal and unresolved change request; keep independently open.
Focused message-delivery PR has failing proof/check gates and product/technical review still unresolved; keep open rather than close or mark fixed.
Useful focused contributor PR with active author follow-up and review-bot findings; keep as independent maintainer-review lane.
Focused agent behavior PR with unresolved change request; preserve as independent open work.
Focused message-delivery PR has an unresolved automated review finding, so keep it open independently.
Low-signal closeout is disabled and there is active author/maintainer signal, so preserve the docs PR as an independent open item.
Exact security-sensitive linked issue must be routed to central OpenClaw security triage and not handled by backlog-cleanup automation.
